title: SAP Price Updater
summary: A desktop utility to match SAP article codes against cost databases for automated manufacturing cost values retrieval.
description: SAP Price Updater bridges the gap between raw SAP exports and internal cost spreadsheets. Replacing tedious manual lookups, this Pandas-driven desktop application seamlessly joins SAP article codes with cost databases. Built with a responsive Tkinter GUI, it features type normalization preventing dataset mismatch, intelligent missing-value interpolation, and clipboard data transfer workflows.
highlights: Smart merging and automated cross-referencing capabilities
Type normalization processing ensuring code uniformity
Dual language interface support alongside clipboard injections
